# Demonstrate callgraph can't connect test scripts to executed binaries

# Step 1: Run a command through scripttest
exec echo "test message"
stdout 'test message'

# Step 2: Get the path to echo to analyze it
# Step 2: Get the path to echo to analyze it
exec sh -c 'which echo > echo_path.txt'

# Step 3: Run callgraph on echo itself - it has a main
exec sh -c 'callgraph -algo static $(cat echo_path.txt) 2>&1 || true'
stdout 'main|error|err' # Some systems' echo might not be analyzable

# Step 4: Run callgraph on this scripttest binary
exec sh -c 'callgraph -algo static $(which mcpscripttest) > mcpscripttest_callgraph.txt 2>&1 || true'

# Step 5: Try to find any connection from scripttest to echo
exec sh -c 'grep -i echo mcpscripttest_callgraph.txt || true'
! stdout 'echo.*main'

# This proves the gap: even though this test executes echo,
# callgraph doesn't show any connection between them
